content: golang.org/x/time/rate: Token bucket rate limiter. rate.NewLimiter(rate, burst) creates limiter. rate.Every(duration) converts interval to Limit. limiter.Allow() non-blocking check. limiter.Wait(ctx) blocks until token available. limiter.Reserve() returns reservation with Delay(). For per-session limiting: create one Limiter per workspace_id stored in sync.Map. For staggered dispatch: rate.NewLimiter(rate.Every(2*time.Second), 1) with Wait(ctx) blocks worker goroutine while yielding to scheduler. Burst=1 allows single immediate token. Safe for concurrent goroutines.
